cmd: bash -c HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 ninja -C projects/RXMesh/src/build RXMesh RXMesh_test -j$(nproc) 2>&1

bash -c 
cmake -S /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/RXMesh/src   -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/RXMesh/build-head   -G Ninja   -DUSE_HIP=ON   -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx1100   -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++   -DRX_USE_POLYSCOPE=OFF   -DRX_BUILD_APPS=OFF   -DRX_BUILD_TESTS=ON   -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release   2>&1 | tail -20 && ninja -C /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/RXMesh/build-head RXMesh RXMesh_test -j16 2>&1 | tail -20
